datasets.description: Site-level Nigerian oil fields (fuel_type = oil only) with status, operator, and ownership context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023. 33 of 180 GOGET fields are classified oil-only.
datasets.label: Oil Fields

datasets.description: Site-level Nigerian gas fields (fuel_type = gas only) with status, operator, and ownership context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023. Only 2 of 180 GOGET fields are classified gas-only -- most Nigerian gas production is associated gas from mixed fields (see Oil & Gas Fields).
datasets.label: Gas Fields

datasets.description: Site-level Nigerian fields producing both oil and gas (fuel_type = oil and gas) with status, operator, and ownership context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023. 145 of 180 GOGET fields (81%) are classified oil and gas -- the majority case for Nigerian fields.
datasets.label: Oil & Gas Fields (mixed)

datasets.description: Gas-only field boundary polygons, including field names not present in the GOGET point inventory above.
datasets.source: Nigeria SE4ALL Open Data Portal
datasets.license: Public portal; explicit redistribution terms not stated
datasets.quality_note: 62 of 124 SE4ALL polygons are classified Gas_Field. Adds real field footprints and field names not covered by GOGET.
datasets.label: Gas Field Boundaries

datasets.description: Oil-and-gas field boundary polygons, including field names not present in the GOGET point inventory above.
datasets.source: Nigeria SE4ALL Open Data Portal
datasets.license: Public portal; explicit redistribution terms not stated
datasets.quality_note: 60 of 124 SE4ALL polygons are classified Crude Oil and Gas Field; 2 more have no field_type recorded and are folded in here rather than treated as pure gas or oil. 8 of 124 total polygons carry no field name in the source.
datasets.label: Oil & Gas Field Boundaries (mixed)

datasets.description: Gas transmission pipeline routes that include Nigeria.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GGIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Public route geometry; cross-border projects may extend beyond Nigeria.
datasets.label: Gas Pipelines

datasets.description: Oil and NGL transmission pipeline routes that include Nigeria.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Public route geometry; storage terminals are not included.
datasets.label: Oil & NGL Pipelines

datasets.description: Nigerian LNG terminal train records with capacity and status context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GGIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Site points with train-level records; multiple records may share a facility.
datasets.label: LNG Terminals

datasets.description: Oil- and gas-fired generating units across Nigerian power stations.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGPT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Unit-level records; counts are not unique power-station counts.
datasets.label: Gas & Oil Power Plants

datasets.description: Major Nigerian refinery sites with nameplate capacity and public status context.
datasets.source: Atlas compilation from public reporting
datasets.license: Derived compilation; review underlying sources
datasets.quality_note: Major refineries only; some coordinates are approximate and modular refineries are incomplete.
datasets.label: Refineries

datasets.description: Upstream and midstream oil/gas point infrastructure: compressor stations, gas plants, flow stations, and FPSOs (floating production, storage & offloading vessels).
datasets.source: Nigeria SE4ALL Open Data Portal
datasets.license: Public portal; explicit redistribution terms not stated
datasets.quality_note: Status, operator, and capacity fields are inconsistently populated. Records matching a facility already tracked in refineries or LNG terminals above are excluded here to avoid double-counting.
datasets.label: Gas & Oil Point Infrastructure

datasets.description: Protected and conserved areas including forest reserves, parks, and wetlands.
datasets.source: UNEP-WCMC / IUCN Protected Planet
datasets.license: Source-specific terms; non-commercial restrictions apply
datasets.quality_note: Authoritative source geometry, simplified only for web display.
datasets.label: Protected Areas (WDPA)

datasets.description: Cross-category industrial demand centres covering cement, steel, fertiliser, and refining.
datasets.source: Atlas compilation reconciled against GEM and OpenStreetMap
datasets.license: Derived compilation; OSM-derived elements are ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Most sites were independently checked; eight locations remain less precisely verified.
datasets.label: Demand Centers

datasets.description: Motorway and trunk road segments used in the public web map.
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
datasets.license: ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Web subset only; the processed CSV also includes primary and secondary roads.
datasets.label: Major Roads

datasets.description: Mapped Nigerian railway line segments.
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
datasets.license: ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Geometry reflects OSM mapping, not confirmed operational service.
datasets.label: Railways

datasets.description: Mapped Nigerian railway stations.
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
datasets.license: ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Locations reflect OSM coverage and may include inactive stations.
datasets.label: Railway Stations

datasets.description: Mapped electricity transmission and minor-line segments.
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
datasets.license: ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Useful for geometry screening; voltage attributes are incomplete.
datasets.label: Power Grid Lines

datasets.description: Mapped electricity substations represented as display points.
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
datasets.license: ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Footprints are converted to centroids in the web bundle; electrical specifications are incomplete.
datasets.label: Substations

datasets.description: Nigerian seaports and offshore oil and gas terminals.
datasets.source: NGA World Port Index via HDX
datasets.license: US government public data
datasets.quality_note: Locations are stable, but facility attributes come from a 2017 source file.
datasets.label: Ports & Terminals

datasets.description: Named public-source mini-grid, captive off-grid, and public-institution solar facilities with technology, status, capacity, and coordinate precision.
datasets.source: Nigeria SE4ALL Open Data Portal; REA/NEP/DARES; ECREEE; NEMSA; institutional sources
datasets.license: Mixed public-source terms; review each record and source
datasets.quality_note: 80 catalogued records: 66 SE4ALL source sites plus 14 official-source additions. Coordinates range from exact site to campus/community centroids. This is not a complete operating registry; zero catalogued records never means zero assets.
datasets.label: Catalogued Off-grid Sites

datasets.description: Quarter-degree settlement-population grid with night-light and grid-distance screening signals.
datasets.source: World Bank Nigeria Distributed Renewable Energy Atlas
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0
datasets.quality_note: Aggregated from 154,319 settlement clusters. Night-light detection is a screening proxy, not a measured household electricity-access rate.
datasets.label: Population & Access Grid

datasets.description: Major settlement clusters, retaining the 40 highest-population source records per state for a responsive web map.
datasets.source: World Bank Nigeria Distributed Renewable Energy Atlas
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0
datasets.quality_note: Web subset of a 154,319-cluster processed inventory. Population and access fields are modelled screening estimates.
datasets.label: Major Settlements
